suggestions.contract_rewrite: Tighten acceptance criteria and explicit out-of-scope boundaries in the contract.
suggestions.prompt_rewrite: Add a scope-check checklist before final answer generation.
suggestions.contract_language_patch: Observed 2 failed/overridden outcomes (OVERRIDDEN=2) tied to ARENA_OVERRIDE_SCOPE_MISMATCH. Contract rewrite: Tighten acceptance criteria and explicit out-of-scope boundaries in the contract. Explicitly encode reviewer checks for: scope-boundary, contract-language, fallback-guard, human-checkpoint, reviewer-override. Fail closed: unresolved checklist items must require manual reviewer approval.
suggestions.prompt_language_patch: Prompt rewrite: Add a scope-check checklist before final answer generation. Require explicit self-check against: scope-boundary, contract-language, fallback-guard, human-checkpoint, reviewer-override. If any mandatory check fails, emit REQUEST_CHANGES with concrete remediation steps.
sample_notes: Contract lacked strict out-of-scope behavior for fallback edits.
Scope boundary language missing for fallback behavior.
